objectives: Define learner, field user, decision, command sequence, accepted latency, failure consequence, and observable value before coding.

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Pokedex Go User Decision
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go team handles case 8082 during a fair-use API stewardship review. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate a useful, bounded, accessible REPL contract on observable command and lifecycle evidence; the fixed PokéAPI origin and fair-use traffic budget must remain enforced; then change one command, argument, EOF, or output-width condition and preserve the session contract. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?
